digest.en: US President Trump extended a cease-fire with Iran. The move comes as Iranian gunboats have been approaching ships near Oman. Pakistan's role in Iran talks is being questioned by the former US NSA.
digest.hi: भारतीय सेना प्रमुख जनरल नरवणे अमेरिका दौरे पर हैं। वह द्विपक्षीय सैन्य संबंधों को मजबूत करने की कवायद में जुटे हैं। उनकी इस यात्रा का उद्देश्य मुक्त और समृद्ध हिंद-प्रशांत क्षेत्र को बढ़ावा देना है।

articles.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Extends Cease-Fire With Iran
articles.summary: Trump extended a ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan's request to mediate an end. The pause in hostilities had been set to expire within hours. The president said Pakistan, which is trying to mediate an end to the war, requested he hold off any attacks.

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: Iranian gunboat approaches ship near Oman, opens
articles.summary: Iran opened fire on a ship near Oman. The Iranian gunboat approached the vessel. US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: Iranian gunboat approaches ship near Oman, opens fire The Times of India.

articles.title: Trump extends ceasefire but blockade continues; Iran attacks container ship off Oman
articles.summary: Trump extended the ceasefire with Iran. Iran attacked a container ship off Oman. Middle East crisis live: Trump extends ceasefire but blockade continues; Iran attacks container ship off Oman The Guardian.

articles.title: Former US NSA Questions Pak's Role In Iran Talks
articles.summary: A former US National Security Advisor questioned Pakistan's role in Iran talks. Former US National Security Advisor delivered a blunt assessment of Pakistan's security establishment. Former US NSA Questions Pak's Role In Iran Talks.

articles.title: Trump extends Iran ceasefire but maintains blockade
articles.summary: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire while maintaining a blockade. Israel and Hezbollah trade fire with talks expected this week, even as more talks are expected in Washington this week after a 10-day ceasefire went into effect last Friday.

articles.title: Iran denies Trump’s claim of women protesters facing execution
articles.summary: Iran denied Trump's claim that women protesters face execution. Iran denies Trump’s claim of women protesters facing execution.

articles.title: Trump says he will extend ceasefire with Iran until negotiations conclude
articles.summary: Trump will extend the ceasefire with Iran until negotiations conclude. Live updates: Trump says he will extend ceasefire with Iran until negotiations conclude CNN.

articles.title: Wallabies 'Iceman' Foley hangs up boots
articles.summary: Australian rugby player Ben Foley, nicknamed 'Iceman', has retired. He played for the Wallabies. Wallabies 'Iceman' Foley hangs up boots.

articles.title: Hezbollah says attacked north Israel in response to Israeli truce violations
articles.summary: Hezbollah attacked north Israel in response to alleged Israeli truce violations. It said the move came “in defence of Lebanon and its people and in response to the blatant” Israeli ceasefire violations, including “attacks on civilians and the destruction of their homes and villages”.

articles.title: Trump says US is extending ceasefire while awaiting proposal from Iran
articles.summary: US President Trump said the US is extending a ceasefire with Iran while awaiting a proposal from Iran. The move comes amid heightened tensions in the region. Live updates: Trump says US is extending ceasefire while awaiting proposal from Iran AP News.

articles.title: Trump's Big Credit To Asim Munir, Shehbaz Sharif For Iran Ceasefire. How Pakistan Gains From It
articles.summary: US President Trump credited Pakistan's Asim Munir and Shehbaz Sharif for helping broker an Iran ceasefire. Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz later thanked Trump. Pakistan's Prime Minister later thanked Trump for accepting Islamabad's request.

articles.title: Trump Announces Iran Ceasefire Extension Until Negotiations Conclude
articles.summary: The US-Iran ceasefire is set to expire, casting doubt on ongoing talks. The ceasefire was established after the US-Iran war broke out on February 28, but its terms are now under review.

articles.title: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire In A Big U-Turn, Says Hormuz Blockade To Continue
articles.summary: US President Trump extended the Iran ceasefire hours before it was set to expire. The Hormuz blockade will continue. Trump's ceasefire extension came hours before it was believed to be set to expire.

articles.title: Pakistan PM Shehbaz thanks Trump for ceasefire extension, citing Pakistan request
articles.summary: Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif thanked Trump for extending the Iran ceasefire, citing a request from Pakistan. Pakistan PM Shehbaz thanks Trump for ceasefire extension, citing Pakistan request.

articles.title: Iran As Trump Claims Tehran To Execute 8 Women
articles.summary: President Trump said Iran will execute eight women, contradicting his earlier statement that their release could aid negotiations. The women's fate remains uncertain amid ongoing tensions between the US and Iran.

articles.title: U.S. military pushes for boost in 2027 spending on drones and air defences used in Iran war
articles.summary: The US military plans to triple drone spending to over $74 billion in 2027, and invest $30 billion in critical munitions, including missile interceptors, due to low stockpiles during the Iran war.

articles.title: US in talks to send Afghan refugees to DR Congo
articles.summary: The US is in talks to resettle Afghan refugees in the Democratic Republic of Congo. Afghan allies who assisted US forces now face a stark choice: resettle in the war‑torn Democratic Republic of Congo or return to Taliban‑ruled Afghanistan.

articles.title: 2 Israeli soldiers jailed over smashing of Jesus statue in Lebanon village
articles.summary: Two Israeli soldiers were sentenced to prison for smashing a Jesus statue in a Lebanese village. The incident has sparked controversy and raised concerns about Israeli-Lebanese relations. 2 Israeli soldiers jailed over smashing of Jesus statue in Lebanon village.

articles.title: Trump extends ceasefire and hopes for ‘unified proposal’
articles.summary: President Trump extended the ceasefire in the war on Iran and expressed hope for a unified proposal. He made the announcement on social media, offering a glimmer of optimism in the conflict.

articles.title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
articles.summary: President Trump backed off a threat to escalate the conflict with Iran, extending a ceasefire for the second time in as many weeks. This buys time for diplomacy, but a final deal remains uncertain.

articles.title: Trump extends ceasefire until Iran submits proposal
articles.summary: Trump extended the ceasefire with Iran until a proposal is submitted. The move came after an Iranian commander threatened to destroy the region's oil industry. An Iranian commander had threatened to destroy the region's oil industry if war resumed with the U. S.

articles.title: महिला आरक्षण पर भाजपा का प्रदर्शन, सड़क जाम से फूटा महिला का गुस्सा, कांग्रेस सांसद ने की आलोचना

articles.summary: पीएम किसान योजना के तहत 23वीं किस्त जारी होनी है, जिसमें 2000 रुपये दिए जाएंगे। आप अपने बैंक खाते में पैसे आने की जांच कर सकते हैं। पीएम किसान योजना के तहत इस बार 23वीं किस्त जारी होनी है, लेकिन क्या इस किस्त के तहत मिलने वाले 2000 रुपये आपके बैंक खाते में आएंगे?

articles.summary: डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने ईरान पर बमबारी की धमकी दी थी, लेकिन बाद में उन्होंने सीज़फ़ायर बढ़ाने का फ़ैसला किया। यह फ़ैसला ईरान के साथ समझौता ना होने की सूरत में लिया गया था। ट्रंप ने अपनी धमकी को वापस ले लिया।
